---
Suite
---
!***> Clean up example fitnesse pool

!| RememberRecordState |
| type | id     | version    | memoryToStorage? |
| user | 121212 | beforeTest | OK               |
| user | 131313 | beforeTest | OK               |

!define currentAuthToken {$adminAuthToken}

!***> Update ${fitnesseSearchId} to point metadata in order to be able to delete it
!define recordType {search}
!define recordId {${fitnesseSearchId}}
!define expectedAnswer {}
!define expectedUpdateResult {OK}
!define updateData {!-{"name":"search","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"ignoreOverwriteProtection","value":"true"},{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchId}!-"},{"name":"type","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"search"}]},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"search"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"metadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"presentationId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchPGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"recordTypeToSearchIn","repeatId":"7","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadata"}]},{"name":"searchGroup","value":"publicSearch"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]}]}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.updateRecord
*!

!| RecordEndpointFixture |
|authToken|type|id|testDeleteRecord?|getStatusType?|
|$adminAuthToken|$hostRecordRecordType|$hostRecordRecordId||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|validationType|${fitnesseValidationTypeId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|validationType|${bigCircuitTrainingLeafletValidationId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|validationType|${circuitTrainingLeafletValidationId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|validationType|${personalTrainingLeafletValidationId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|search|${trainingClassLeafletSearchId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|search|${fitnesseRecordTypeSearchId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|recordType|${trainingClassLeafletId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|recordType|${fitnesseRecordTypeId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|sequence|${fitnesseSequenceId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${circuitTrainingLeafletGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${circuitTrainingLeafletNewGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${bigCircuitTrainingLeafletGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${bigCircuitTrainingLeafletNewGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnessePGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseOutputPGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseNewPGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseNewOutputPGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseMetadataPVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseMetadataOutputPVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseAnotherMetadataPVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseAnotherMetadataOutputPVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataPVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataOutputPVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseMetadataPNumVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseMetadataOutputPNumVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnessePLinkId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseOutputPLinkId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnessePCollVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseOutputPCollVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseBinaryPLinkId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseBinaryOutputPLinkId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseRecordInfoNewPGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseRecordInfoNewOutputPGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseRecordInfoPGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseRecordInfoOutputPGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|search|${fitnesseSearchId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseSearchPGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseSearchOutputPGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseSearchGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseSearchIncludeGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseSearchIncludePartGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|searchTerm|${fitnesseSearchTermId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseSearchOutputPVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|presentation|${fitnesseSearchPVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseSearchTextVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseRecordInfoGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseNewGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|collectTerm|${fitnesseCollectIndexTermId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseRecordInfoNewGroupId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseMetadataTextVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseAnotherMetadataTextVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataTextVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseMetadataNumberVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseCollectionVarId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseCollectionId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseBlueItemId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseLinkId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata|${fitnesseBinaryLinkId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|text|${fitnesseBlueTextId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|text|${fitnesseRecordTypeSearchDefTextId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|text|${fitnesseRecordTypeSearchTextId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|permissionRole|${fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRoleId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|permissionRule|${fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRuleId}||OK|
|$adminAuthToken|text|${fitnesseTextId}||OK|


 #Not needed presentations because we are using excludePGroupCreation flag
*!
